name_en: 🌷【With full original red box packaging】🌷【New】The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, creating a choice for collection in the coming years. This bi-fold cardholder is crafted with beige and dark brown new GG interlocking pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. It features multiple card slots and other multifunctional pockets.
name_cn:
🌷【With full original red box packaging】🌷【New】The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, creating a choice for collection in the coming years. This bi-fold cardholder is crafted with beige and dark brown new GG interlocking pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. It features multiple card slots and other multifunctional pockets.
Beige and dark brown new GG interlocking pattern coated fabric
Brown leather lining
Inside: 8 card slots, 2 hidden pockets, and 1 external card slot
Weight: approx. 0.085 kg
Model: 821209
Open dimensions: 15cm (W) x 12cm (H); Closed dimensions: 7.5cm (W) x 12cm (H)
Color: Brown PVC/Original leather
Italian creation
